title: The Capture of Dungeon Baal, Part 1
overview: Tells the story of Sinbad's early life. This arc deals with Sinbad trying to capture the first Dungeon, Baal. It introduces such characters as Sinbad and his parents, Esra and Badr, as well as Yunan, Dragul and the First Imperial Princess of the Parthevia Empire, Serendine.

title: The Capture of Dungeon Baal, Part 2
overview: Tells the story of Sinbad's early life. This arc deals with Sinbad trying to capture the first Dungeon, Baal. It introduces such characters as Sinbad and his parents, Esra and Badr, as well as Yunan, Dragul and the First Imperial Princess of the Parthevia Empire, Serendine.

title: The Capture of Dungeon Valefor, Part 1
overview: The second story arc in the Adventures of Sinbad OVA series. It deals with Sinbad traveling to Imuchakk and meeting Hinahoho as well as them trying to conquer the Valefor Dungeon.

title: The Capture of Dungeon Valefor, Part 2
overview: The second story arc in the Adventures of Sinbad OVA series. It deals with Sinbad traveling to Imuchakk and meeting Hinahoho as well as them trying to conquer the Valefor Dungeon.
